title: Payment term GET schema
description: A schema for retrieval of a single payment term.

paymentTermsNumber.description: A unique identifier of the payment term.

daysOfCredit.description: The number of days before payment must be made.

description.description: A description of the payment term.

name.description: The name of the payment term.

paymentTermsType.description: The type of payment term defines how the payment term behaves.

contraAccountForPrepaidAmount.description: The contra account for prepaid amount of the payment term.

accountNumber.description: The account number of the contra account.

self.description: A unique link reference to the contra account for prepaid amount item.

contraAccountForRemainderAmount.description: The contra account for remainder amount of the payment term.

accountNumber.description: The account number of the contra account.

self.description: A unique link reference to the contra account for remainder amount item.

creditCardCompany.description: The credit card company of the payment term.

customerNumber.description: The credit card company customer number.

self.description: A unique link reference to the customer item.
A unique link reference to the payment term item.
